idea-plugin.name: PDE-VCS Exporter

action.description: Export compiled class files and web resources for selected changes

idea-plugin.description:
PDE-VCS Exporter helps teams export deliverable files from local VCS changes directly inside IntelliJ IDEA.

It exports Java sources as compiled class files, exports web resources using a web-package-style directory structure, and creates a timestamped export root directory for each operation.

The plugin is designed for SVN-oriented workflows where changed files need to be packaged quickly for deployment or handoff.
